title: NXP Semiconductors: Betting On The Automotive Industry's Digital Revolution
text: I am bullish on NXP, as I believe the company is poised to capture market opportunities in the strong growing semiconductor market. Moreover, with 50% revenue exposure to the car industry, I view NXP as well positioned to take advantage of the automotive industry's digital revolution.

title: 5 Dividend-Paying Stocks to Watch in the Semiconductor Space
text: Here we present five high-quality dividend-paying semiconductor stocks, TXN, VSH, NXPI, SWKS and ADI, whixh may fetch promising returns amid the ongoing chip shortage due to log-jammed supply chains.

title: 3 Electric Vehicle Stocks to Buy During the Market Sell-Off
text: Want to be in on the steady expansion of electrified cars? These three companies look like fantastic bets right now.
